title: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology (MANIT Bhopal) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech can grab this chance and apply for the MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
